title: AI Just Crossed The Line We Were Afraid Of: Continual Harness
summary: Princeton researchers introduced Continual Harness, a self-improving AI system that learns while running, can modify its own instructions, create helper agents and tools, and maintain memories across interactions. The approach enables AI agents to adapt and improve without human intervention or system resets, demonstrated on tasks like playing Pokémon.
